inspirationReferences.name: Herman Miller
influencedElements: Warm materiality via teak border tones and wood-grain CSS textures
Rounded-rectangle card shapes echoing molded plywood forms
Spacious density with generous whitespace between elements

inspirationReferences.name: Cereal Magazine
influencedElements: Serif heading typography (Playfair Display) paired with clean sans body (DM Sans)
Editorial warmth in the welcome banner and content tone
Considered whitespace throughout all view layouts
Minimal border usage favoring soft shadows for depth
Warm cream background as primary surface color

inspirationReferences.name: Awwwards Sites Of The Day
influencedElements: Premium polish in micro-interactions (hover lift effects on cards)
Subtle opacity + translateY entrance transitions on view switches
Refined button states with shadow elevation changes
Focus ring styling with accent-colored box-shadows
Consistent visual rhythm across all 10 views

designPrinciples: Warmth over coldness — every surface should feel inviting
Organic curves meet geometric grids — softness with underlying structure
Typography carries emotion — serif headings create editorial authority
Wood-grain texture adds tactile quality without overwhelming content
Generous breathing room — spacious density lets content speak
